stories.headline: Live updates: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s multi-day wedding celebration is underway - CNN
stories.summary: An event believed to be the rehearsal dinner for the couple kicked off Swift and Kelce’s wedding festivities ahead of Friday’s big celebration, according to people familiar with the planning.

stories.headline: White House’s Taylor Swift-Inspired Meme Celebrating Trump Ignites Merciless Remix Pile-On - Mediaite
stories.summary: The White House handed critics an easy template for parody as the format was quickly repurposed by internet users to troll Trump.

stories.headline: Madonna Finds a Nonstop Groove on Her Best Album in 20 Years - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: On 'Confessions II,' Madonna shows how dramatic and ecstatic a dance floor can be. Our review.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce make donations to KC's Harvesters food bank, Children's Mercy, other groups - KMBC
stories.summary: As the rumored wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce nears, the couple is giving back to communities around the country, including Kansas City.

stories.headline: America Has Two Options at the Box Office This Fourth of July Weekend. The Choice Is Clear. - Slate Magazine
stories.summary: Two new movies promise to tell a tale of the history of the United States. Only one truly captures it.
